title: Investigation: Kingston Independent Residents Group (GB)
text:
Subject: Kingston Independent Residents Group (GB)

Investigated for: Late delivery of Statement Of Accounts (SOA) for 2023

Decision: No determination of offence

Summary of reasons: The Commission decided to discontinue the investigation as a reasonable excuse for the delay was provided. No determination of offence was therefore made, and the case was closed with no further action.
